CMD herdr session list --json
OUT {"sessions":[{"default":true,"name":"default","running":false,"session_dir":"/home/user/.config/herdr","socket_path":"/home/user/.config/herdr/herdr.sock"},{"default":false,"name":"3dsendai-spike","running":true,"session_dir":"/home/user/.config/herdr/sessions/3dsendai-spike","socket_path":"/home/user/.config/herdr/sessions/3dsendai-spike/herdr.sock"}]}
